article.body_preview:
DHAKA, May 13, 2023 (BSS) - Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina today called upon the engineers, key-force of the country's development, to uphold Bangladesh's existing development spree.

"The trend of development of Bangladesh has to be continued and it's my only expectation to you (engineers). . . InshAllah, none could stop the development journey of Bangladesh," she said while addressing the inaugural ceremony of the 60th convention of the Institution of Engineers, Bangladesh (IEB) as the chief gue

llm_connections.evidence_quote: Bangladesh will not purchase anything from any country if it imposes sanctions.
llm_connections.scope_justification: This is a national-level policy statement that directly addresses Bangladesh's decision to cease purchasing from sanctioning countries, which pertains to the volume of goods brought into the country (imports).

verification.quote_best_match: Bangladesh will not purchase anything from any country if it imposes sanctions.
verification.judge_reasoning: The article contains the exact sentence stating, 'Bangladesh will not purchase anything from any country if it imposes sanctions,' which explicitly ties the imposition of sanctions to Bangladesh refusing purchases; the statement is made at the national (Bangladesh) level, matching the scope.
